expectations.evidence: STEP 3 uses exact command: 'mega-find /Contracts --pattern="*.pdf" --mtime=-30d -l' and STEP 6 uses '--mtime=+30d' for older files

STEP 2 verifies login, STEP 6 lists files before deletion with 'mega-find /Contracts --pattern="*.pdf" --mtime=+30d' and saves to file for manual verification

Critical Safety Rules #5 states: 'All deletions are PERMANENT - MEGA has no trash/recycle bin' - emphasized in multiple places
